LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SUN WING WO TRADING COMPANY, INC., YUI-WUN CHAN AND LAI CHAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-17-558691 AND CGC-17-557669 IS GRANTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE TWO CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THIS CASE WILL BE THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS WILL BE IN THIS CASE ONLY. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCTOBER 25, 2017 IN THIS CASE NOW APPLIES TO BOTH CONSOLIDATED CASES AND THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOVEMBER 8, 2017 IN CASE 558961 IS BE VACATED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)
